meaning: n.家具,设备,服饰用品,穿戴用品,室内陈设品
examples: To enable rental increases, you have to have luxurious furnishings.
For protection against unforeseen emergencies, you insure your house, your furnishings and your car.
She was interested in the furnishings of that room.
Decor respectfully blends colonial pieces with Art Deco furnishings and hand-painted artwork on the walls.
Accordingly, Rao remains cautious about housing-related sectors such as furnishings, hardware and building materials.
